title: GROUP COLONY
sub: Ant-army teams — each group is a set of small agents (one job each) plus a synthesizer that fuses their answers. Mr.Flow delegates deep analysis to a group.
create_ok: group deployed — fill its roster below
empty: No groups yet. Deploy one above, then fill it with member agents.
task_label: TASK — framing handed to each member
delete_confirm: Delete group "{name}"? Its folder + roster are removed (the member agents are NOT deleted).
arch_title: Build a team from a prompt
arch_sub: Describe the team you want — the Architect designs the specialists + a lead, builds the agents, and wires the group. It appears below, ready to chat.
arch_ph: e.g. team peramal — fortune from primbon, zodiac & fengshui
arch_building: designing + building the team… (this can take a moment)
arch_invalid: describe the team in a few words first
chat_hint: The coordinator fans out to every member, then the synthesizer fuses one answer.
chat_pick: Pick a chat on the left, or start a new one.
chat_input_ph: Type a message…  (Enter to send, Shift+Enter = newline)
chat_delete_confirm: Delete this chat? Its history is removed.
chat_intro_architect: Tell the Architect what team you want — it asks, proposes, and builds when you say go. Like chatting to build an app.
chat_intro_group: Chatting with this team — it remembers the whole conversation.
